channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: The impact of Iran's attacks on the UAE
item.description: The UAE, billed as a global luxury destination, has received the bulk of Iran's attacks in the region so far.
item.content:encoded: The UAE, billed as a global luxury destination, has received the bulk of Iran's attacks in the region so far.
item.dc:creator: Aya Batrawy

item.title: Middle East war enters its 8th day
item.description: The U.S. and Israeli war with Iran has entered a second week, with drones and missiles crisscrossing much of the Middle East and death tolls rising.
item.content:encoded: The U.S. and Israeli war with Iran has entered a second week, with drones and missiles crisscrossing much of the Middle East and death tolls rising.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Kahn

item.title: British Columbia moves to permanent daylight saving time
item.description: The premier of the Canadian province of British Columbia, David Eby, explains why this Sunday is the beginning of a new era of permanent daylight saving time there.
item.content:encoded: The premier of the Canadian province of British Columbia, David Eby, explains why this Sunday is the beginning of a new era of permanent daylight saving time there.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Ma

item.title: How the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran is realigning the politics of the Middle East
item.description: NPR's Adrian Ma speaks with author and journalist Kim Ghattas about the impacts the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran will have on the broader region.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Adrian Ma speaks with author and journalist Kim Ghattas about the impacts the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran will have on the broader region.
item.dc:creator: Michael Levitt

item.title: Shedding light on how Epstein used visits to Interlochen to target girls
item.description: An NPR reporting team sheds new light on how Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell used their access to the Interlochen Center for the Arts to target girls.
item.content:encoded: An NPR reporting team sheds new light on how Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell used their access to the Interlochen Center for the Arts to target girls.
item.dc:creator: Ava Berger

item.title: Daughters of Donbas band sings songs of stolen Ukrainian children
item.description: A group of Ukrainian musicians is touring the world to remind people that thousands of Ukrainian children have been kidnapped by Russia.
item.content:encoded: A group of Ukrainian musicians is touring the world to remind people that thousands of Ukrainian children have been kidnapped by Russia.
item.dc:creator: Robbie Griffiths

item.title: First HBCU D1 women's wrestlers compete at championship
item.description: It's a weekend of firsts in Iowa, where the first national women's college wrestling championship is taking place and the first HBCU Division 1 women's wrestling team is fielding players.
item.content:encoded: It's a weekend of firsts in Iowa, where the first national women's college wrestling championship is taking place and the first HBCU Division 1 women's wrestling team is fielding players.
item.dc:creator: Jason Fuller

item.title: Documenting life as a free man, after 30 years in prison
item.description: A look at KALW's "Uncuffed" podcast, and a conversation with Greg Eskridge, talking about life after he was paroled in the summer of 2024 - after spending more than 30 years in prison - and his relationship with his family and society.
item.content:encoded: A look at KALW's "Uncuffed" podcast, and a conversation with Greg Eskridge, talking about life after he was paroled in the summer of 2024 - after spending more than 30 years in prison - and his relationship with his family and society.
item.dc:creator: Mallory Yu

item.title: Questioning Georgia O'Keefe's legacy and protecting the land in northern New Mexico
item.description: Georgia O'Keeffe claimed New Mexico's desert "my country." But Pueblo peoples lived on the land long before the artist arrived. There's a push for a more complex view of O'Keeffe and her time there.
item.content:encoded: Georgia O'Keeffe claimed New Mexico's desert "my country." But Pueblo peoples lived on the land long before the artist arrived. There's a push for a more complex view of O'Keeffe and her time there.
item.dc:creator: John Burnett

item.title: Teachers across California are considering work stoppages
item.description: Teachers across California have been preparing for potential strikes as state funding for schools struggles to keep up with costs.
item.content:encoded: Teachers across California have been preparing for potential strikes as state funding for schools struggles to keep up with costs.
item.dc:creator: Farida Romero
